title: nepeta velutina
intro: Nepeta velutina, also known as Velvet Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Nepeta velutina is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
